revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初九]][[zh:十二月初九]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 9|qq=December 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|646|en|646|qid=Q33285|lt=646|1=646}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|qid=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōtoku|en|Emperor Kōtoku|qid=Q317980|lt=Emperor Kōtoku|1=Emperor Kōtoku}} relocated the capital to Naniwa Nagatara Toyosaki-no-miya. * {{ill|Heiji|en|Heiji|qid=Q1193930|lt=Heiji|1=Heiji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1160|en|1160|qid=Q19662|lt=1160|1=1160}} {{ill|January 19|en|January 19|qid=Q2266|lt=January 19|1=January 19}}) – Officials including {{ill|Fujiwara no Nobuyori|en|Fujiwara no Nobuyori|qid=Q2918443|lt=Fujiwara Nobutada|1=Fujiwara no Nobuyori}} and {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitomo|en|Minamoto no Yoshitomo|qid=Q532301|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitomo|1=Minamoto no Yoshitomo}} attacked the residence of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|後白河上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317984}}, confining {{ill|Emperor Nijō|en|Emperor Nijō|qid=Q440149|lt=Emperor Nijō|1=Emperor Nijō}}; the {{ill|Heiji rebellion|en|Heiji rebellion|qid=Q944859|lt=Heiji Rebellion|1=Heiji rebellion}} began. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|qid=Q509889|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1321|en|1321|qid=Q5769|lt=1321|1=1321}} {{ill|December 28|en|December 28|qid=Q2832|lt=December 28|1=December 28}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} abolished the cloistered rule of {{ill|Emperor Uda|ja|後宇多法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Uda|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後宇多天皇|1=Emperor Go-Uda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q440538}} and assumed direct rule. * {{ill|Culmination|en|Culmination|qid=Q611114|lt=Shōchū|1=Culmination}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1324|en|1324|qid=Q5773|lt=1324|1=1324}} {{ill|December 25|en|December 25|qid=Q2745|lt=December 25|1=December 25}}) – Following the edict {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei|ja|黄檗隠令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} during the Genkō era, the era name was changed to {{ill|Culmination|en|Culmination|qid=Q611114|lt=Shōchū|1=Culmination}}. * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1681|en|1681|qid=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|en|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|qid=Q313745|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi}} dismissed the Tairō and {{ill|Sakai Tadakiyo|en|Sakai Tadakiyo|qid=Q7402769|lt=Sakai Tadashige|1=Sakai Tadakiyo}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} {{ill|January 26|en|January 26|qid=Q2282|lt=January 26|1=January 26}}) – In the Senkoku disturbance, the Tokugawa shogunate reduced the domainal holdings of {{ill|Sengoku Hisashi|ja|仙石久利|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku Hisashi|1=Sengoku Kuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11378154}} of the Izushi Domain and punished his retainer, {{ill|Sengoku Sakyō|ja|仙石左京|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku Sakyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 仙石久寿|1=Sengoku Hisatoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11378156}}. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|qid=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}) – The Restoration edict ({{ill|Osei Fukkō no Dai-gōrei|ja|王政復古の大号令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osei Fukkō no Dai-gōrei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 王政復古 (日本)|1=restoration of imperial rule|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q835568}}) was issued by the court as the anti-Bakufu forces prevailed, leading to the establishment of the new government. == Births == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1619|en|1619|qid=Q6804|lt=1619|1=1619}} {{ill|January 24|en|January 24|qid=Q2278|lt=January 24|1=January 24}}) – {{ill|Yamazaki Ansai|en|Yamazaki Ansai|qid=Q6565636|lt=Yamazaki Ansei|1=Yamazaki Ansai}}, a monk and founder of the Shintō tradition known as Suika Shintō (died {{ill|1682|en|1682|qid=Q7648|lt=1682|1=1682}}). == Deaths ==
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Roujitsu|ja|臘日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roujitsu|1=Roujitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11612427}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|8|12|10|11|9|1|12|1209|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:12 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:December 9 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 12월 9일]] [[ja:12月9日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月初九]]
[[ar:December 9 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- No deaths listed --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月初九]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月初九]] {{wikidata link|Q840489}} [[Category:Days 9 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar December]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
